creator: ginga-freebsd@ginganet.org
text:
The provided patch is not applicable, since japanese/kappa20 port is currently not available.
japanese/kappa20 port have been converted to japanese/font-kappa20 port at 2015-09-25, and it's port-skeleton was changed to have same style with other japanese fonts.
If similar problem exists, please post again as a report to japanese/font-kappa20 port.
